title: Amiga 600: The Amiga no one wanted
content:
The Amiga 600 was one of the last Amigas, and it became a symbol of everything wrong with Commodore and the product line. Retro enthusiasts like it today because of its small size, so it’s the perfect retro Amiga for

The post Amiga 600: The Amiga no one wanted appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
